# cairn bootstrap

Write a default .cairn/config.yaml to a vault directory

## Help

```text
Write a default .cairn/config.yaml to a vault directory

Usage: bootstrap [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --vault-path <PATH>
          Vault root directory (default: current directory)

          [default: .]

  -h, --help
          Print help
```
